name: @agentunion/aun-browser
description: AUN Protocol Core SDK for Browser

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && playwright test --config=playwright.agentid-local.config.ts tests/e2e-browser/e2ee.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build && playwright test --config=playwright.agentid-local.config.ts tests/e2e-browser/e2ee.spec.ts --grep "SDK 创建 AID" --reporter=line
